differential_diagnoses: Primary lung adenocarcinoma with malignant pleural effusion
Extranodal marginal-zone B-cell lymphoma (MALT lymphoma) involving the pleura
Diffuse large B-cell lymphoma with pleural involvement
next_steps: Immunophenotyping by flow cytometry of pleural fluid
Immunohistochemistry of pleural fluid cell block (e.g., AE1/AE3, TTF-1, CD20, CD3, kappa/lambda)
CT of the chest, abdomen, and pelvis with contrast
Pleural fluid adenosine deaminase (ADA) level and tuberculosis culture
If minimally invasive testing is inconclusive, pleural biopsy (image-guided or thoracoscopic)
